subject: Jackie Chun (Dragon Ball Super) — older male-presenting figure with wild white hair and white beard in a white martial arts uniform, in a combat-ready stance with electric energy
description: An older male-presenting figure with wild white hair and a white beard stands in a martial arts combat stance wearing a white gi. Yellow-white electric energy crackles intensely around him. The figure's expression is fierce and determined, belying the aged appearance. The composition is a close mid-shot emphasizing the upper body and face. This is the tournament alias identity of Master Roshi.
foreground: white-haired elder in white gi crackling with electric energy, combat stance
background: yellow and white electric energy burst
